zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Douglas於大約1460年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安時，她的父親Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig46歲，母親Janet Matheson32歲。她於1479年與Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1499年2月16日在英國蘇格蘭享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Douglas于大约1460年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安时，她的父亲Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig46岁，母亲Janet Matheson32岁。她于1479年与Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston在英国苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1499年2月16日在英国苏格兰享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Douglas was born about 1460, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig, was 46 and her mother, Janet Matheson, was 32. She married Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston in 1479, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 16 February 1499, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Douglas est née environ 1460, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Janet Matheson, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston en 1479, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 février 1499, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Douglas um 1460 in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig 46 und ihre Mutter Janet Matheson 32. Sie hat 1479 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Februar 1499 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Douglas è nata il circa 1460 nel East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Janet Matheson, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston nel 1479, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 16 febbraio 1499, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Douglasが約1460年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンで生まれた時，父Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrigは46歳，母Janet Mathesonは32歳であった。1479年にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグでArchibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchistonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1499年2月16日にイギリススコットランドで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Douglas(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Matheson(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1479년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 2월 16일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Douglas nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Janet Matheson, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston em 1479, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1499, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Douglas родилась около 1460 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Matheson, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston в 1479 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 16 февраля 1499 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Douglas nació aproximadamente 1460, en East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Janet Matheson, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Archibald Napier 4th Laird of Merchiston en 1479, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1499, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
